creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 239107
Screenshot: a non-bugged view (not limited to latest matching builds)

<http://beefy16.nyi.freebsd.org/index.html> includes parallel build: of 7b822dde35ab for 131amd64-default, more than six hours elapsed: 

<http://beefy16.nyi.freebsd.org/build.html?mastername=131amd64-default&build=7b822dde35ab>

<https://pkg-status.freebsd.org/builds?type=package> filtered for: 

    131amd64

* lists an earlier build (stopped:done:)
* does not list the latest, more recent (parallel build:). 

Clearing 131amd64 from the search field, then sorting by status, reveals just one 'parallel build:' amongst latest matching builds, for a server that's not found: 

<https://pylon.nyi.freebsd.org/build.html?mastername=120powerpc64-quarterly&build=529041>
